since_last: 51% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +2.06%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC +0.37% · Gold +0.29% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 51% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +2.06%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +2.06%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +9.97%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +9.97%, META +6.91%, WDAY +4.28%, CRM +3.73%, NOW +3.56%. Laggards: MU -5.85%, MRVL -5.07%, LRCX -4.92%, ARM -4.83%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.29% at $170.37
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.29% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
